CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR# 2031. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-18-2007 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-07-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-17-2007 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered Plaintiff's Counsel sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Floyd L. Butler, CSR#2518. (212)
